form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign when last of 8 at Sunshine Coast Cl1-Sw December 14 over 1800m, 27 len behind Easy Love with 60kg at $91. form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign fifth of 10 at Sunshine Coast 0 - 58 October 26 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Keepmeinthelope carrying 60kg at $3.20. Previously first up; sixth of 8 at Gold Coast 3&4yo Bm65 August 30 over 1100m, 4.5 len behind Joy A Plenty with 57.5kg at $9. Everything points to an effective return.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 39-day let-up. At the latest run 2nd of 10 at Dalby 0 - 55 on March 3 over 1100m, 0.7 len behind Rum Diary with 59kg at $17. The race before that couldn't go on with it; ran last of 8 at Dalby Bm58 on February 14 over 1400m, on a slow track; 18 len behind Switch To Go carrying 58.5kg at $8. Kept fresh since the last run and is definitely worth including.
